# Third-Party License Review

Status: confirmed

This manifest records the chosen repo-level license basis for the current staged export.
The operator confirmed that GitHub repository-level license evidence is the review basis for this export.

## Group-Level License Evidence

- `Baoyu public repo skills`: license `confirmed` Observed license marker `MIT` Observed in the public repository README License section on GitHub. Operator confirmed that this export uses the GitHub repository as the source basis, so repo-level license handling is used here instead of ClawHub registry release terms.
- `Baoyu inferred family extensions`: license `confirmed` Observed license marker `MIT` Candidate repo-level license evidence comes from the public JimLiu/baoyu-skills README License section. Operator confirmed that these imported skills were sourced from the same GitHub repository at repo level, even though the staged copy does not carry direct per-skill homepage metadata.
- `Baoyu public repo packages`: license `confirmed` Observed license marker `MIT` Only repo-level MIT evidence is currently confirmed; the vendored local package.json files do not carry their own license fields. Operator confirmed that these vendored units are accepted under the same GitHub repo-level source and license basis for this export.
